notes: Data-driven TabForge mini-app packages. Packages are JSON only and do not contain native executable code.

apps.name: Mesh Plus
apps.summary: Channel-aware mesh messenger actions, GPS-optional status sends, and saved-node friendly defaults.

apps.name: IR Remote Pack
apps.summary: Starter NEC remote macro pack for the Tab5 Grove IR unit controls.

apps.name: Voice Notes
apps.summary: Mic-level voice draft helpers for sending voice-note metadata through mesh text.
